body_txt: Similar to a Slow-Motion Drop but instead of an inanimate object dropping, we see a person falling backwards (or, rarely, forwards) in slow-motion, usually, after being shot. Bonus points if their True Companions are watching: it's the cue for an appropriately slowed down Big "NO!" . There's a bit of Truth in Television to this, as stressful situations can cause people's perception of time to slow down due to the adrenaline pumping. See also Disney Villain Death . Sub-Trope of Death Is Dramatic . If it goes on long enough for it to start being funny, it's I Fell for Hours . Be warned that this is frequently a Death Trope .
